name: DigitalX Limited
description: DigitalX Limited is an Australia-based technology and investment company specializing in the commercialization of blockchain technology and digital asset management. The company operates through three main segments: Product Development, Digital Asset Management, and Blockchain Consulting. DigitalX provides secure, institutional-grade access to digital assets through its investment funds, including Bitcoin and digital asset funds, while also developing innovative software solutions and real-world asset tokenization platforms.
